description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly a deep green color, accented by white trim along the roofline and around the windows. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on the visible walls, allowing for ample natural light inside. The front of the house includes a covered entryway with a white pergola structure and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The roof is flat and bordered by a low parapet, giving the building a contemporary urban appearance. The overall structure suggests a single-story residence with a focus on simplicity and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story green house with a flat roof, large windows, and a white pergola entryway. The design is clean and geometric, with symmetrical window placement and white trim.
description_view_0: Side view showing a single large window centered on a green wall, with the flat roof and white trim visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with a white pergola, steps, and two large windows on the left side.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the pergola extending from the front, a large window on the side, and the steps leading to the entry.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying two large windows symmetrically placed on the green wall, with the flat roof and white trim.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a white pergola, and a recessed door beneath an overhang.
